target_cmd: curl -s https://www.solaceagi.com/api/v1/health -w '\n%{time_total}' && echo '---' && curl -s https://www.solaceagi.com/api/v1/llm/models | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print('levels:', len(d['levels']), 'markup:', d.get('managed_markup'))" && echo '---' && curl -s -o /dev/null -w 'homepage:%{http_code}' https://www.solaceagi.com && curl -s -o /dev/null -w ' agents:%{http_code}' https://www.solaceagi.com/agents && curl -s -o /dev/null -w ' download:%{http_code}' https://www.solaceagi.com/download && curl -s -o /dev/null -w ' inspector:%{http_code}\n' https://www.solaceagi.com/inspector
target_name: God's Final Judgment — Full System Divine Audit (65537)
context: God's Final Judgment (q-agi-065537): The omniscient audit. Health responds fast, LLM models shows 5 levels with markup, all 4 key pages return 200. This is the divine synthesis test: is the system approaching 65537 (Fermat prime, eternal, perfect)? The evidence: health latency + model count + page availability. If all pass, the system is worthy. If any fail, a gap remains on the path to 65537.
